results.name: Trained Persistent Memory Frozen LLM Six Methods
results.rationale: Frozen LLM + persistent memory loosely echoes baking-freeze permanence, but no 2-axis depth-orientation encoding, no K-cohort write policy, no gradient-flow-through-unfrozen-cells on 2D grid, no per-tablet page granular metadata access.

results.name: Memory Autonomous LLM Agents Survey
results.rationale: Generic agent memory survey. No 2-axis K-depth x M-orientation 16-cell encoding, no cuneiform-style wedge grid, no K-cohort scribe-LLM consensus, no baking-confirm freeze with selective gradient flow.

results.name: Collaborative Memory Multi-User Dynamic Access Control
results.rationale: Dynamic access control resonates weakly with per-tablet page granular access by locality/timestamp/scribe-ID/content-type, but addresses user/permission sharing, not 2-axis depth-orientation 16-cell grid, K-cohort write policy, or baking-freeze permanence.

results.name: MemOS Memory OS AI MemCube
results.rationale: MemCube structured memory cells + metadata/provenance fields overlap loosely with fibrous-impression metadata and per-tablet granular access, but lacks 2-axis K-depth x M-orientation 16-cell encoding, K-cohort consensus write, and baking-confirm freeze.

results.name: Memory in LLMs Mechanisms Evaluation Evolution
results.rationale: Generic LLM memory mechanisms survey. No 2-axis wedge encoding, no K-cohort write specialization, no baking-freeze with selective gradients, no per-tablet page granular metadata.

results.name: DeepSeek Engram Conditional Memory
results.rationale: Engram is N-gram-style conditional memory lookup as sparsity axis complementary to MoE. No 2-axis depth-orientation encoding, no K-cohort consensus write, no baking-freeze permanence, no scribe metadata.

results.name: Adaptive Soft Rolling KV Freeze
results.rationale: KV-freeze with adaptive soft rolling closely instantiates the baking-confirm permanence freeze step where gradients flow only through unfrozen cells. Strong functional match on one core mechanism (func=0.7 threshold). Lacks 2-axis depth-orientation encoding and K-cohort policy, but freeze-permanence + selective-gradient functional mapping crosses 0.7 threshold.

results.name: HeLa-Mem Hebbian Associative Memory
results.rationale: Hebbian associative memory is correlation-based plasticity, unrelated to 2-axis K-depth x M-orientation 16-cell wedge encoding, K-cohort consensus writes, or baking-freeze permanence.

decision_rationale: 1 hit at rank 7 (Adaptive Soft Rolling KV Freeze, func=0.70 borderline) on baking-confirm permanence freeze + selective-gradient-through-unfrozen mechanism. Other 7 results lack 2-axis depth-orientation encoding, K-cohort consensus write, and baking-freeze permanence. Verdict FAIL agrees with primary; verifier sees 1 hit vs primary 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.92 / func 0.74-0.92 (verifier scores per-paper coverage stricter, but verdict matches).
